SOUN.title: Voice AI Is Heating Up—SoundHound Is Back On Investors' Radar

TWLO.title: Voice AI Is Heating Up—SoundHound Is Back On Investors' Radar

macro_events.event_summary: A MarketWatch op-ed argues higher inflation is coming and the Fed should signal rate hikes more clearly before acting.
primary_drivers: Rising inflation expectations lifting breakevens and nominal yields
Hawkish Fed repricing — higher real rates and steeper front-end
Rotation from long-duration assets to inflation beneficiaries

beneficiaries.rationale: Oil & gas integrated — direct revenue leverage to inflation as energy is a primary CPI driver; historically strong real-asset hedge with cash flows that rise with commodity prices.
Same energy-as-inflation-hedge thesis; large dividend, lower duration than tech, benefits from re-rating toward real-asset cash flows when rates and inflation rise together.
Largest US bank with significant asset-sensitive balance sheet; net interest margin expands as the Fed hikes and the curve steepens at the front end.
Earns substantial net interest revenue on client cash sweeps; directly leveraged to higher short rates if Fed hikes, as priced in by hawkish repricing.
Domestic steel producer with pricing power in inflationary environments; commodity producers historically outperform when inflation surprises to the upside.

headlines: Higher inflation is on the way. The Fed needs to make this clear before it raises rates.
